title: Orange Hypergiant Star
description: Replacing our sun with an Hypergiant orange star!!!
body:
**What if we replace our sun with a bigger one, like hypergiant stars??!!!!** 

Well this pack will make that change, the Hypergiant star is known as larger and much rare type of star in the universe, it is also superior to supergiant in terms of radius,  But because of its size and mass, this star becomes unstable and near to death. 

## Installation
- Download the file
- Place the file in resourcepack file inside _.minecraft_
- Turn on the pack by moving it to right column _in game_
- Finally you made it!
